Our Services

Designed for implementation and accountability

What Clients Receive

Comprehensive support across every engagement

Diagnostics and analysis Implementation-ready plans Tools and systems Capacity building Results frameworks and reporting

Strategy & Advisory

Strategy development translated into actionable plans with clear priorities, governance, and KPIs.

We help institutions move from high-level goals to concrete, measurable strategies. Every plan is tied to delivery mechanisms, accountability frameworks, and realistic timelines.

  • Strategic planning and policy advice
  • Institutional diagnostics
  • Stakeholder engagement frameworks
  • KPI development and governance design
  • Program theory of change

Governance & Institutional Strengthening

Support to improve institutional performance, coordination, and accountability systems.

SOMVISCON supports ministries and public institutions to strengthen governance systems, improve service delivery, and meet fiduciary standards required by development partners.

  • Institutional capacity assessments
  • Reform roadmaps and implementation
  • Policy and regulatory development
  • Results-based management systems
  • Public sector coordination

Project Management, MEL & Compliance

End-to-end delivery support including planning, reporting, evaluation, and compliance.

We provide project support aligned with operational policies and result frameworks, covering design, implementation, monitoring, evaluation, learning, and compliance advisory.

  • Project design and delivery support
  • MEL system development
  • Results frameworks and indicators
  • Donor reporting and compliance
  • Fiduciary and safeguard advisory

Digital & IT Consulting

Design and implementation of digital service delivery systems, dashboards, and data platforms.

We support institutions to use technology for improved service delivery, data management, and decision-making. Our digital solutions are designed for sustainability and local capacity.

  • Digital service delivery platforms
  • Management information systems
  • Data dashboards and analytics
  • Digital transformation strategy
  • Technology capacity building

HR & Capacity Development

Workforce development, training, and organizational strengthening aligned to delivery needs.

We help organizations build the human capital needed for effective service delivery, combining institutional assessment with targeted training and mentoring.

  • Workforce planning and development
  • Training program design and delivery
  • Organizational restructuring
  • Performance management systems
  • Knowledge transfer and mentoring

Need implementation support?

Tell us about your program and we will propose a tailored approach.

Request a Proposal View Our Sectors
SOMVISCON

Advisory and implementation support for government, development partners, and institutions across Somalia.
